projects.title: Steam Data Pipeline
projects.description: End-to-end data pipeline for extracting, transforming, and analyzing Steam gaming data. Automated ETL processes with scheduled data collection and processing.
projects.longDescription: A comprehensive data engineering project that builds an automated pipeline for collecting and analyzing Steam platform data. Features include API integration, data transformation, storage solutions, and analytical insights.
highlights: Automated data collection from Steam API

projects.title: FlashLingo
projects.description: AI-powered language learning application with flashcard system. Interactive vocabulary builder with smart repetition algorithms.
projects.longDescription: An intelligent language learning platform that uses spaced repetition and AI to help users master vocabulary efficiently. Built with modern Python frameworks and interactive UI.

projects.title: Model Evaluator
projects.description: Framework for evaluating and comparing machine learning models. Automated testing, metrics calculation, and performance visualization.
projects.longDescription: A comprehensive toolkit for ML model evaluation that provides standardized testing procedures, multiple metrics, and detailed performance reports with visualizations.

projects.title: AI-Powered Podcast Manager
projects.description: Automated podcast transcription, audio enhancement, and content generation system using modern AI APIs.
projects.longDescription: Full-stack application built during LIA at Podmanager. Handles automated podcast workflows including transcription, audio enhancement, and AI-powered content generation using ElevenLabs and other modern APIs.

projects.title: Corruption Detection System
projects.description: Machine learning system for identifying political corruption patterns and unethical practices in business and politics.
projects.longDescription: Advanced NLP and ML system developed during LIA at Linespotting AB. Processes over 1 million rows of data to identify patterns of corruption and unethical behavior using sophisticated text analysis and classification models.

projects.title: Stock Movement Predictor
projects.description: LSTM and classification models for predicting short-term stock market movements using historical data.
projects.longDescription: Deep learning project using LSTM neural networks and classification algorithms to predict stock price movements. Features data preprocessing, feature engineering, and model training with PyTorch.
